display.purpose: KPI values and account totals — the figure the user came to read. Geist Mono 500.

headline.purpose: Page and section titles. Geist Sans 500.

body.purpose: Names, descriptions, news, copy. Geist Sans 400, measure 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Panel headers and column heads, often uppercase tracked. ≤4 words.

numeric.purpose: Every inline figure in tables/lists. Geist Mono 400, tabular.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Floating overlays only — dropdown menus, profile popover. Never on cards or panels.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default for color/background/border state transitions (tabs, buttons, rows).

motion.name: skeleton-pulse
motion.purpose: Loading skeleton tiles; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The page's single call to action. Amber on near-black.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:32px; padding:0 10px; border:none; border-radius:4px; background:oklch(0.72 0.14 74); color:oklch(0.08 0 0); font-family:Geist Sans, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:oklch(0.72 0.14 74 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(0.72 0.14 74 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action; no chrome until hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; height:32px; padding:0 10px; border:none; border-radius:4px; background:transparent; color:oklch(0.64 0.008 74); font-family:Geist Sans, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background:oklch(0.16 0 0); color:oklch(0.94 0.005 74); }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Flat card surface — depth from tonal step + 1px border, never shadow.
components.css: .ds-panel { background:oklch(0.12 0 0); border:1px solid oklch(0.20 0 0); border-radius:3px; padding:16px; } .ds-panel-label { margin:0 0 12px; font-family:Geist Sans, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.04em; text-transform:uppercase; color:oklch(0.64 0.008 74); } .ds-panel-body { color:oklch(0.94 0.005 74); font-family:Geist Sans, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Transparent field with amber focus glow; mono for numeric entry.
components.css: .ds-input { height:32px; width:100%; padding:4px 10px; border:1px solid oklch(0.20 0 0); border-radius:4px; background:transparent; color:oklch(0.94 0.005 74); font-family:Geist Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:0.875rem; outline:none; transition:border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:oklch(0.64 0.008 74); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color:oklch(0.72 0.14 74); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(0.72 0.14 74 / 0.5); }

components.name: Nav Tab
components.description: Top-bar text tab; active fills accent surface, idle is muted until hover.
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; gap:4px; height:48px; align-items:center; padding:0 24px; background:oklch(0.105 0 0); } .ds-tab { padding:6px 12px; border-radius:2px; font-family:Geist Sans, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; color:oklch(0.64 0.008 74); cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { background:oklch(0.16 0 0 / 0.6); color:oklch(0.94 0.005 74); } .ds-tab-active { background:oklch(0.16 0 0); color:oklch(0.94 0.005 74); }

components.name: Heatmap Tile
components.description: Signature Futures unit — background alpha scales with move magnitude, hue encodes direction.
components.html:
WTI CrudeCL=F
78.42+2.14%
components.css: .ds-tile { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:4px; padding:10px 12px; border-radius:2px; border:1px solid oklch(0.72 0.15 152 / 0.40); background:oklch(0.72 0.15 152 / 0.25); } .ds-tile-top { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:baseline; gap:4px; } .ds-tile-name { font-family:Geist Sans, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; color:oklch(0.94 0.005 74); } .ds-tile-sym { font-family:Geist Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:0.6rem; color:oklch(0.64 0.008 74); } .ds-tile-bot { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:baseline; gap:4px; } .ds-tile-price { font-family:Geist Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:oklch(0.64 0.008 74); } .ds-tile-pct { font-family:Geist Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; color:oklch(0.94 0.005 74); }

narrative.overview: Fintrack is a calm, dark desk lit by a single warm lamp. The surface is near-black; the only warm light in the room is Signal Amber, used the way a desk lamp pools light over the work that matters. It is an after-hours environment: focused, quiet, and exact, where a glance tells you where you stand. Depth comes from tonal layering, not shadow — background, panel, popover, and sidebar sit a few lightness steps apart, separated by hairline borders. Figures are monospace so ledgers align; prose is humanist sans so the chrome stays human. It rejects Robinhood gamification, generic bank-template blandness, and Mint-style consumer pastels.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black surface with a single warm accent — amber as the only light source
Monospace for every number, humanist sans for every word
Flat by default: depth from tonal layers + 1px borders, not shadows
Semantic color only — amber (brand), emerald (gain), ruby (loss)
WCAG AA contrast, tuned for one intended environment (dark)

rules.name: The Single Lamp Rule
rules.body: Signal Amber lights ≤10% of any screen. It marks the brand, the active state, and the one thing to act on — never decoration, never twice for emphasis.

rules.name: The Earned Color Rule
rules.body: Emerald and ruby are forbidden except to encode gain and loss. A green that doesn't mean 'up' breaks the instrument.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Every quantity is set in Geist Mono, every word in Geist Sans. The split is the system.

rules.name: The Flat-Desk Rule
rules.body: Panels and cards are flat at rest. Shadow appears only when an element physically floats above the page (a menu, a popover).

dos: Do set every number in Geist Mono and every word in Geist Sans.
Do keep Signal Amber under ~10% of any screen.
Do reserve emerald strictly for gain and ruby strictly for loss, encoded redundantly (sign, value, label).
Do build depth with tonal steps and 1px borders.
Do give every transition a ~150ms ease and a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Do verify body text ≥4.5:1 (muted-ink on panel passes).
donts: Don't gamify — no confetti, streaks, progress-bait, or celebratory animation.
Don't drift toward bank-template blandness or Mint-style pastels.
Don't put a drop shadow on a card or panel; shadows belong only to floating overlays.
Don't use amber, emerald, or ruby for anything that doesn't carry their meaning.
Don't set prices or percents in a proportional font, or run sentences in mono.
Don't introduce a light mode or warm-tinted near-white surface.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
